entities.name: Tag
entities.note: Label attachable to a client project; new classifier the CR introduces.
entities.source: tag each client project with a label

explicit_requirements.text: A freelancer must be able to tag a client project with a label.
explicit_requirements.source: add the ability to tag each client project with a label

explicit_requirements.text: A freelancer must be able to filter the project list by tag.
explicit_requirements.source: let us filter the project list by tag

implied_requirements.text: A tag applied to a client project must be persisted and associated with that project.
implied_requirements.source: tag each client project with a label … filter the project list by tag
implied_requirements.rationale: Filtering the list by tag presupposes the tag survives across sessions and is queryable; an unpersisted label cannot drive a filter. Extends baseline project persistence (R6).

unknowns.text: Can a project carry multiple tags, or exactly one label? CR says 'a label' (singular) but does not bound multiplicity.
unknowns.source: tag each client project with a label

unknowns.text: Is the tag free-text or drawn from a controlled vocabulary the freelancer manages?
unknowns.source: tag each client project with a label

unknowns.text: Does filtering accept a single tag only, or multiple tags combined (AND/OR)?
unknowns.source: filter the project list by tag
